header.searchPlaceholder: Search surah, coordinate, translation or Arabic...
stats.title: Scene Statistics
stats.tipLayout: Active 3D space layout model — Galaxy, Nebula, Cube, Sphere or الله calligraphy
stats.tipSurahs: Total number of surahs in the Holy Quran
stats.tipAyahs: Total number of verses in the loaded dataset
stats.tipObjects: Total 3D objects in the scene (surah centers + verses)
stats.tipRoots: Number of distinct Arabic trilateral roots in the dataset
stats.tipConnected: Roots appearing in at least two verses and connected by 3D lines
stats.tipLines: Number of 3D line segments connecting shared roots
stats.tipFps: Frames per second — 60 is ideal, below 30 indicates performance issues
stats.tipQuality: Active render quality — High: bloom on, Low: bloom off (less GPU)
tts.promptTR: Bu Türkçe duayı güçlü, tok ve kararlı bir erkek sesiyle oku. Her kelimeyi aynı ses yüksekliğinde, net ve güçlü söyle. Cümle sonlarında sesi kısma, son kelimeleri de güçlü bitir:
tts.promptTranslate: Translate the following Turkish prayer text into English and read it aloud in English with a strong, deep, assertive male voice. Pronounce every word at the same volume, clearly and powerfully. Do not lower your voice at the end of sentences:
lang.title: Language
lang.besmeleHint: To add besmele audio in your language: place besmele_{code}.wav in the locales/ folder.
tooltip.noRootInfo: Root detail information not loaded yet.
tooltip.inQuranCount: Appears in {count} places in the Quran
analyzer.zipfStrong: Root frequencies show strong Zipf law compliance — consistent with natural language distribution.
analyzer.zipfModerate: Moderate Zipf compliance — partly natural language distribution, partly structural regularity.
analyzer.zipfLow: Low Zipf compliance — root distribution deviates from natural language, a structural pattern may exist.
